---
name: implement
description: Describe when to use this prompt
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

I'm looking to build a new web app with instructions in spec.md and a defined implementation-plan.md, can you start building this out. 

I want you to take one iteration at a time. 
- create a new git branch for this full set of changes
- develop it
- test it
- add and commit changes. dont push for now
- provide a summary of the changes and ask me to manually review
- wait for me to confirm that im happy to proceed to next iteration
